scoring: Event clusters: max(jaccard(event titles), jaccard(text+slugs vs text+tickers), jaccard(structured slug tokens vs ticker/series)). Markets: same plus structured pair score; optional domain bonus; date gate on end_time_utc when both parseable. strict_same_event off: unmapped Poly events search all Kalshi; global fallback allowed.
aligned_pairs_csv: aligned_market_pairs.csv includes alignment_strict_same_event, mapped_kalshi_exchange_event_id (Kalshi event_ticker used for the bucket), then poly_/kalshi_ end_time_utc, domains, slugs, series_ticker, liquidity, exchange_symbol.
